title: Dynamic App Name Global Variable for Snowflake Permissions SQL
description:
Snowflake allows users to rename the installed app, which invalidates the hardcoded SQL for granting permissions. The permissions code needs to dynamically reflect the current app name.

### Goal
Use a global variable (`DATATOOLS_PRO_EXPLORER`) for the app name so the permissions SQL is generated dynamically based on the actual installed app name rather than a hardcoded string.
acceptance_criteria: Permissions SQL uses a global variable for the app name
Changing the app name in Snowflake is reflected in the permissions SQL
Users can grant permissions without manually editing the SQL
middleware_changes: Replace hardcoded app name in permissions SQL with a dynamically resolved global variable.
implementation_notes: Marked as low priority. The Snowflake Native App name can be retrieved and used to dynamically generate permissions GRANT SQL.
